title_en: The Bread Ingredient Banned in Yoga Mats!
title_es: El Ingrediente del Pan Prohibido en Tapetes de Yoga!
hook_en: Did you know your bread shares an ingredient with yoga mats?
hook_es: ¿Sabías que tu pan comparte un ingrediente con tapetes de yoga?
key_message: Azodicarbonamide, used in bread and yoga mats, is banned in the EU due to health risks.
_source_regulation_context:
ADDITIVES BANNED IN OTHER COUNTRIES BUT LEGAL IN US:
  • Azodicarbonamide: Bread (as dough conditioner) — also used in yoga mats/shoe soles — Banned in: EU, Australia, Singapore — Health concern: Breaks down into semicarbazide (possible carcinogen) during baking

US OBESITY RATES OVER TIME:
  • 1960: 13.4% (adults), 5.0% (children)
  • 1980: 15.0% (adults), 5.5% (children)
  • 1994: 22.5% (adults), 10.0% (children)
  • 2000: 30.5% (adults), 13.9% (children)
  • 2010: 35.7% (adults), 16.9% (children)
  • 2016: 39.8% (adults), 18.5% (children)
  • 2020: 41.9% (adults), 19.7% (children)
  • 2024: 43.0% (adults), 21.0% (children)

title_en: The Shocking Rise of Obesity in America
title_es: El Impactante Aumento de la Obesidad en América
hook_en: Why is obesity skyrocketing in the US?
hook_es: ¿Por qué la obesidad está aumentando en los EE.UU.?
key_message: Regulatory changes and permissive policies have contributed to the increase in obesity and unhealthy food consumption.
